---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a scoped product or engineering outcome
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What verified user or engineering problem should be solved?

## Proposed Outcome

Describe the desired result without prematurely fixing implementation technology.

## Scope

State included and excluded behavior.

## Alternatives

List alternatives considered, including doing nothing.

## Security Implications

Describe trust-boundary, wallet, transaction, authorization, or abuse implications.

## Data Implications

Describe sources, retention, privacy, quality, provenance, and migration concerns.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Outcomes are observable and testable.
- [ ] Required documentation or ADR work is identified.
